form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Resuming 2nd of 13 at Chantilly All Weather on March 3 over 1900m, 0.5 len behind Lavendin carrying 56kg at $10. Second-up favourite; won by 1.3 len at Chantilly All Weather March 23 over 1900m defeating Her Christopher carrying 58kg at $4.70. Hard to go past.

form.formComment: Resumes after a break of 11 weeks and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign by 0.8 len this track January 23 over 1900m defeating Sijoux with 59.5kg at $5.60. form.formComment: Resumes after a break of five months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation by nose this track November 6 over 1900m defeating Effira carrying 59.5kg at $7.80. When resuming last campaign eighth of 15 at this track April 8 over 1900m, 2.75 len behind Atanasio with 59kg at $18. Worth serious consideration.
